task_description: Integrate Firebase Firestore as the primary data persistence layer for the Clear-mind/ThoughtFlow app, replacing localStorage-only storage with dual persistence (Firestore primary, localStorage fallback). The user has no coding experience, so the integration must work out-of-the-box once they fill in their Firebase config values.

verification.summary: npm run build succeeds. No test suite exists in this project. The chunk size warning (622KB) is pre-existing and unrelated to Firebase changes. Firebase integration gracefully falls back to localStorage when not configured.
